name: Hush Puppies (from Foxfire)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the self-rising flour, cornmeal, salt, and baking soda.
2. Add the egg and buttermilk, mixing until the batter is smooth and can hold its shape when rolled into a ball.
3. Stir in the chopped onion.
4. Roll the mixture into balls about 1 to 2 inches in diameter.
5. Drop the balls into deep hot fat.
6. Fry until they are brown and crispy.
7. Allow them to drain on paper towels before serving hot.
